hero.name: Waleed Abdullah
hero.title: Blazor App Developer & WordPress Expert
hero.description: I build modern, user‑friendly web apps and websites that help businesses grow.

about.title: About Me
about.statement: Turning complex problems into elegant digital solutions.

details.label: Professional Experience
details.content: Over 5 years of experience in the tech industry, leading MERN stack projects and crafting bespoke WordPress solutions.

details.label: Education & Qualifications
details.content: BS in Computer Science (BSCS) with a solid foundation in data structures. Certified WordPress expert and coding bootcamp graduate.

details.label: Career Goals
details.content: Passionate about building highly scalable, user-centric web applications and contributing to innovative global tech projects.

resume.title: Senior Web Developer
resume.description: Leading the development of scalable MERN stack web applications. Overseeing successful deployments and collaborating with cross-functional teams.

resume.title: BS Computer Science
resume.description: Completed coursework in software engineering, data structures, and web technologies. Graduated with honors and led the university coding club.

resume.title: WordPress Expert
resume.description: Designed and developed custom WordPress themes and plugins. Delivered tailored e-commerce solutions and corporate websites to diverse clients.

resume.title: Full-Stack Bootcamp
resume.description: Intensive 6-month bootcamp focusing on modern web development practices including React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

testimonials.quote: Waleed delivered an exceptional website that perfectly matches our brand. His attention to detail and ability to execute complex MERN stack features is outstanding.
testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins

testimonials.quote: Working with Waleed was a seamless experience. He completely revamped our WordPress site to be faster, more secure, and beautifully responsive.
testimonials.name: Michael Lee
